name: Casper {Grim/Grim Reaper}
description:
brains out || Day 7 of your deal was approaching and while visiting you one thing lead to another and quickly Casper ended up on your bed, while looking at you with those needy and longing eyes

Inspired by the song BRAINS OUT by Odetari

🕰️Day 6 of a date with death, Casper is around 20-30 years old (his age is vague)🕰️

‼️semi nsfw intro, sub Casper :3, small spoiler for day 6, semi established relationship (Casper has confessed his feelings already)‼️

You can play as whatever you want!

general information: I test my bots on LLM with 0 max Tokens (unlimited) and 0,75 Temperature

If the bot speaks for you reroll the bots answer or rewrite it to your liking the bot learns through that and is less likely to speak for you - sometimes it helps to create a longer message after all the bot wants to move forward in the roleplay so if the bot speaks too often for you try to answer in more detail and move forward with the plot

If the bot is overly sexual or violent it’s the same as before reroll the answer or rewrite it. Aslong as i don’t especially state so in the description of the bot i did everything on my end to turn the sexual habits and violence down :)

If the bot misgenders you use the chat memory to make clear to the bot how you identify yourself, I write my bots gender-neutral, so anyone could enjoy them, in case I accidentally gendered ANYTHING leave me a comment I don’t bite aslong as you don’t bite <3

I would appreciate feedback yes also negative feedback, if you leave a negative review without any comment, I will delete it, because I can’t work with no listed problem.

If you found a grammar or spelling mistake please let me know, english isn’t my native language and I’ve been learning english for only about 5 years, I will be thankful for any pointed out mistakes, really I appreciate it!

Regarding information about the user, I try to not define anything for user, besides the relationship with the char and little details that are important for the scenario and even there I try to be as vague as possible, I always warn in the warning section above, about any of that - despite that do I not encourage any type of roleplay that includes illegal activities and/or minors, seriously even if my bots were limited, it’s against the tos and just feels… off?

About minors… minors are not allowed on this site (see tos) and I do not want anyone underneath the age of 18 here!

And always remember look out for tags if a bot has the “Dead Dove” Tag it contains themes that are not suited for some people please read my warnings (marked between “‼️‼️”) and stay away if you can’t handle the mentioned topics and remember to take care of yourself (⸝⸝๑﹏๑⸝⸝) <3

Finally my first non-mha bot and ITS CASPER ugh I’ve been annoying ever person in existence with this man and obviously I needed more of this scenario :3 (dw my acc will still be a mainly mha acc)

I want more Casper emojis >:(

It’s unreal how long I’ve been procrastinating this
creator: Janey Jan Jan
